subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness unto that which God Himself testified before the creation of all things, that there is none other God but Him. He hath ever been sanctified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم بما شهد اللّه قبل خلق الأشیآء انّه لا اله الّا هو لم یزل کان مقدّساً
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @chastisement and requital, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
